# Domain Model Template

## Document Status
Draft / Proposed / Approved

## Domain Name

## Model Overview
Summarize the aggregate boundaries, entities, and value objects.

## Aggregates
Describe each aggregate and its root.

## Entities
List entities and their identities.

## Value Objects
Define value objects and immutability rules.

## Domain Events
List domain events produced by the model.

## Invariants
Document invariants and consistency rules.

## Relationships
Describe relationships between aggregates and domains.

## Diagrams
Include validated Mermaid diagrams where relevant.

## Related Governance Documents
- `docs/governance/documentation-standards.md`
- `docs/governance/glossary.md`

## Notes
Add any additional notes or model assumptions.
